feedback.text: I would like to Protect consumers from losing software that they bought. Companies include in their terms they can revoke your license any time without giving any reason. They have done this multiple times while customers payed for a product they, through no choice of their own, do not own anymore. You should keep access to what you bought and payed for. I would also like to Protect children from predatory behavior with micro transactions in games. Where the prices are very high, it is unclear what you get or when you have to buy game currency before you can buy anything. I am very happy with the Digital Fairness Act and that consumers are actually protected in the EU!
